programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A mother in Philadelphia takes on a biker who shatters her window. In England, two drivers get into a street fight that appears to involve a rock. A school bus in South Carolina veers off-road and slams into a house.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A crossing guard in Pennsylvania fights an impatient motorist, while in Texas, a four-car pileup leads to a stabbing on the freeway; in Thailand, an exploding manhole cover propels a motorcyclist upward.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A man in San Diego strikes an SUV with a bat; a woman is sent flying by a garbage truck; a semi truck driver's life hangs in the balance when an erratic driver causes her rig to careen halfway off a bridge in Louisville.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A motorist brandishes a knife at a semi driver after they collide on an Albuquerque highway. Police in Ohio utilize multiple PIT maneuvers during a high-speed chase. An SUV driver attempts a multi-point turn while dangling off a steep drop in China. A man in Kentucky attempts to document an allegedly dangerous driver, who then pulls a firearm on him.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A motorist struggles to break up a fistfight between drivers in New Jersey. A cyclist turns traffic vigilante in England and clashes with commuters. A runaway circling car heads toward its ejected driver in Montana. A police chase in Texas turns dire when the suspect plows through a shopping mall.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: In Apollo Beach, Fla., a woman brandishes a gun after an alleged altercation on the road; after a wild chase through downtown Los Angeles, a man attempts to flee from police on a skateboard.
